legend.gf: gluten-free version available on almost every dish — just ask us.
legend.allergens: Dishes may contain traces through cross-contamination. If you have allergies or intolerances, please ask us before ordering.

hero.eyebrow: Argentine flavours · Australian spirit · Barcelona heart

historia.imgAlt: ARAU's facade at Carrer de Provença 322: terracotta awning with the «ARAU · Grilled Brunch» sign and Agustina, the founder, at the entrance
historia.title: Arau was born from a simple idea.
historia.p1: To bring together in one place the flavours, experiences and cultures that left their mark over the course of a journey. With Argentine roots, Australian inspiration and a Barcelona heart, [[ARAU]] blends the tradition of Argentina, the creativity of Australian brunch and a passion for specialty coffee.
historia.p2: A space where different cultures meet around the table to create something new, warm and authentic. Because we believe some of the best things are born from the mix.
historia.p3: We're inspired by home cooking, quality produce and those little details that turn a meal into an experience. For us, hospitality isn't just a service: it's our way of making them feel at home.
historia.p4: Barcelona is now our home, and [[ARAU]] is our way of sharing with the city everything that inspired us through years of travelling, learning and discovery. Welcome to Arau. Welcome to our story.
historia.heartImgAlt: Two hands forming a heart, ARAU's signature

home.title: Discover the house favourites
home.sub: Dishes made with care, fresh ingredients and a blend of flavours inspired by our Argentine roots and Australian brunch culture. The full menu is just one click away.

dish1.name: Big brekky
dish1.desc: Sausage, bacon, beans, two eggs, mushrooms, hash brown and spinach.

dish2.name: Benny & the eggs
dish2.desc: Chipá bread (gluten-free cheese bread), poached eggs, hollandaise and crispy bacon.

dish3.name: The tru mila
dish3.desc: Schnitzel with truffled mushroom sauce, melted Gouda and a fried egg. Served with fries and chipotle mayo.

dish4.name: Flantástico
dish4.desc: Homemade dulce de leche flan with whipped cream. For many, the best flan in Barcelona.

home.note: Allergies or a special diet? Let us know when you book and we'll sort it out.

cafe.imgAlt: Specialty flat white in a handmade ceramic cup
cafe.title: The flat white is a religion
cafe.lead: The brunch brings us here; the coffee makes you want to come back. We work with specialty coffee and pay tribute to Australian coffee culture with classics like the Flat White, Magic and Long Black. More than 1,500 cups leave our bar every month.

eventos.title: Things happen at [[ARAU]]
eventos.sub: Bingo, live music, ñoqui night and more. Follow us on Instagram @araubrunch for the calendar and more information.

loyalty.text: Your 6th brunch, on us. Earn points with every visit in our loyalty app and the sixth one is on the house.

experiencia.title: What our Brunch Lovers say
experiencia.sub: This is how our guests enjoy the [[ARAU]] experience.
experiencia.reviewsText: Hundreds of customer reviews on Google back the [[ARAU]] experience.

visitanos.title: We'll be waiting for you in the heart of the Eixample
visitanos.mapTitle: Map of ARAU at Carrer de Provença 322, Barcelona

reservar.title: Join the table
reservar.lead: Book your spot or your table. For groups of 5 people or more, we'll confirm your booking by email once you've made it.

form.hint: Up to 4 guests, your booking is confirmed instantly. For larger groups, we'll confirm by email the same day.

inscripcion.title: Sign up for
inscripcion.success: You're in! We've added you. We'll be in touch to confirm.
inscripcion.errorMsg: We couldn't send your sign-up. Try again or message us on Instagram.
